author: EXCALIBUR
title: Tab Menu
description:
A simple, customizable tab menu that utilizes ProfileStore. I made this for my game, but I decided to open-source this version. I plan to find an actual UI designer for later. I think some people could maybe learn/utilize this in their own games/builds.

As always, if you have questions on it, you can dm me, and I'll do my best to respond. Same with pinging me in here, I don't accept friend requests though, so please just dm/ping if you have a question.

Credits: mori.
